content:
I missed out on some news! I've just read that [a fuel truck hit crash into guard rail](http://sfgate.com/cgi-bin/article.cgi?f=/c/a/2007/04/29/BAGVOPHQU46.DTL) somewhere along I-580/I-880 in the Bay Area.

The [photos](http://sfgate.com/cgi-bin/object/article?f=/chronicle/archive/2007/04/29/BAGVOPHQU46.DTL&o=0) show the full extend of the damage. Hmmm ...
